scripts.scrape-6mo-list: MAX_PAGES=40 MAX_AGE_MONTHS=6 FETCH_CONTACT_DETAILS=false SCRAPE_ONLY=true HEADLESS=false node scraper.js
scripts.turbo-list: TURBO_MODE=true MAX_PAGES=40 MAX_AGE_MONTHS=6 PARALLEL_LIST_PAGES=3 FETCH_CONTACT_DETAILS=false SCRAPE_ONLY=true HEADLESS=false node scraper.js
scripts.resume-turbo: TURBO_MODE=true START_PAGE=33 MAX_PAGES=40 MAX_AGE_MONTHS=6 PARALLEL_LIST_PAGES=3 FETCH_CONTACT_DETAILS=false RESUME_CHECKPOINT=true SCRAPE_ONLY=true HEADLESS=false node scraper.js
scripts.turbo-enrich-only: TURBO_ENRICH=true ENRICH_CONCURRENCY=2 SCRAPE_ONLY=true HEADLESS=false node scraper.js
scripts.turbo-full: TURBO_MODE=true MAX_PAGES=40 MAX_AGE_MONTHS=6 PARALLEL_LIST_PAGES=3 FETCH_CONTACT_DETAILS=false RESUME_CHECKPOINT=true HEADLESS=false node scraper.js && TURBO_ENRICH=true ENRICH_CONCURRENCY=2 HEADLESS=false node scraper.js
scripts.test-env: node -e "import 'dotenv/config'; const p=process.env.SEEK_PASSWORD; console.log('length:', p?.length); console.log('endsWith#:', p?.endsWith('#'));"
